scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,mobile -c blue,cyan,magenta "bun run --filter @my-product/api dev" "bun run --filter @my-product/web dev" "cd apps/mobile && flutter run"
scripts.test: bun run --filter @my-product/api test && bun run --filter @my-product/shared test && bun run --filter @my-product/web test && cd apps/mobile && flutter test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @my-product/shared typecheck && bun run --filter @my-product/api typecheck && bun run --filter @my-product/web typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --filter @my-product/web lint && cd apps/mobile && dart analyze
